channel.title: models on New Wayland
channel.description: Recent content in models on New Wayland

item.title: Look Ma No Tax: From Zero to Full Employment
item.description: Demonstrating how the Job Guarantee precisely offsets the drain to savings

item.title: How the Job Guarantee Fixes Mainstream Macro
item.description: Adding a Job Guarantee to the peer reviewed mainstream agent model

item.title: Adding a JG to the Baseline Model
item.description: Algorithm changes required to the Baseline Model to support a Job Guarantee

item.title: The Indivisibility Issue
item.description: Modern money shows how wage values can drop below goods values

item.title: Revealed: The Simple Change That Breaks Mainstream Macro
item.description: Price competition breaks peer reviewed mainstream agent model
